draft:
Dear Sir or Madam:

I am writing to provide my strongest recommendation for Mr. Arjun Kataria. As a Partner at Summit Ventures, I have had the privilege of working closely with Mr. Kataria and witnessing his remarkable contributions to the field of AI for clinical trials.

Summit Ventures is a venture capital firm based in Redwood City, California, specializing in pre-seed and seed investments. Founded in 2013, the firm is known for its deep involvement with a small number of high-quality founders, providing not only financial support but also mentorship and resources to help startups grow. Summit Ventures has a strong focus on technology, healthcare, and artificial intelligence, aligning perfectly with Mr. Kataria's expertise.

My background includes extensive experience in venture capital, particularly in the healthcare and AI sectors. I have been with Summit Ventures since 2019, starting as an Investor and progressing to Principal and now Partner. In these roles, I have led investments in early-stage startups, supported portfolio companies, and spearheaded initiatives like the Women Founder Circles (WFC) program, which supports female technical founders. Prior to joining Summit Ventures, I gained valuable experience in strategy and operations through roles at FlipHost and The New York Strategy Collective, where I focused on healthcare and technology projects. My educational background includes an MBA from The Kellogg School of Management, with a specialization in Healthcare Management, Entrepreneurship, and Innovation, and a Bachelor of Science in Industrial Engineering from Northeastern University.

Through my role at Summit Ventures, I have had the opportunity to work closely with Mr. Kataria and witness his remarkable contributions to the field of AI for clinical trials. Summit Ventures has been involved with Cedar AI, the company Mr. Kataria co-founded, since its early stages. We have provided both financial support and strategic guidance to help the company grow and succeed. Over the course of our collaboration, I have gained a deep understanding of Mr. Kataria's expertise, leadership, and innovative approach to solving complex problems in the clinical trial space.

Mr. Kataria is the co-founder of Cedar AI, a groundbreaking company that is transforming the clinical trial industry through the use of artificial intelligence. Cedar AI's innovative platform enables clinical research organizations to recruit and engage with participants at scale, significantly reducing the time and cost associated with traditional clinical trials. By leveraging advanced AI algorithms, Cedar AI is able to identify and match suitable participants more efficiently, ensuring that trials are conducted more swiftly and effectively.

Cedar AI's impact on the industry is profound. The platform addresses one of the most significant bottlenecks in clinical research: participant recruitment and retention. By streamlining these processes, Cedar AI not only accelerates the pace of medical research but also enhances the quality and reliability of clinical trials. This has the potential to bring new treatments and therapies to market faster, ultimately improving patient outcomes and advancing healthcare innovation.

Under Mr. Kataria's leadership, Cedar AI has attracted significant attention and investment from major venture capital firms. The company has raised substantial funding from prominent investors, including B-Star Investments, Elm Capital, LifeLeap Ventures, Frontline Capital, Summit Ventures, and Minh Tai. This financial backing is a testament to the confidence the investment community has in Cedar AI's vision and Mr. Kataria's ability to execute it. The support from such reputable firms underscores the potential of Cedar AI to make a lasting impact on the clinical trial landscape.

In addition to his role at Cedar AI, Mr. Kataria has a rich background in technology and clinical research. He has held significant positions such as Software Engineer at the Stanford Department of Medicine, where he developed software to increase participant recruitment in clinical trials. His experience in various roles, including Fellow at Nordic Ventures and Software Engineer at Luma, Singapore, has equipped him with a diverse skill set that he brings to his current venture.

Mr. Kataria's educational background further complements his professional experience. He holds a Master’s Degree in Engineering Management from Stanford University, a program that combines rigorous analytical training with a strong focus on innovation and technology management. This educational foundation has provided him with the tools to effectively lead and innovate in the highly specialized field of AI for clinical trials.

In conclusion, Mr. Arjun Kataria is a visionary leader and innovator in the field of AI for clinical trials. His work at Cedar AI is not only transforming the clinical trial industry but also has the potential to significantly advance healthcare innovation and improve patient outcomes. His ability to attract substantial investment from major venture capital firms further underscores his credibility and the confidence the investment community has in his vision. Mr. Kataria's unique blend of technical expertise, entrepreneurial spirit, and commitment to advancing healthcare make him an invaluable asset to the industry. I have no doubt that he will continue to make significant contributions to the field and drive meaningful change in the years to come.

Please feel free to contact me if you require any further information.

Sincerely,

Victoria Cho

Partner

Summit Ventures

[email contact here]
final:
Dear USCIS Officer,
 
I am truly delighted to recommend Mr. Arjun Kataria, a remarkable individual whose expertise in AI for clinical trials has had a profound impact on the field. 

As a Partner at Summit Ventures, a venture capital firm based in Redwood City, California, I have dedicated myself to exploring the intersections of healthcare and AI. My journey with Summit Ventures began in 2019 as an Investor, culminating in my current position as a Partner. In this role, I lead investments in early-stage startups, support our portfolio companies, and champion initiatives like the Women Founder Circles (WFC) program, which empowers female technical founders. My background with FlipHost and The New York Strategy Collective further sharpened my strategic and operational skills, particularly in healthcare and technology sectors.
 
Throughout my tenure at Summit Ventures, I have had the valuable opportunity to work closely with Mr. Kataria, observing firsthand his groundbreaking contributions to AI innovations in clinical trials. This partnership was further strengthened by our commitment to Cedar AI, the company he founded. From its inception, we have offered financial assistance and strategic guidance, fostering a collaboration that has deepened my admiration for Mr. Kataria's leadership, expertise, and innovative solutions to complex industry challenges.
 
Additionally, Mr. Kataria serves as the visionary force behind Cedar AI, a pioneering company that is revolutionizing the clinical trial industry through artificial intelligence. Cedar AI’s platform empowers clinical research organizations to efficiently recruit and engage participants at scale, reducing the time and cost traditionally associated with clinical trials. By leveraging advanced AI algorithms, the company accelerates trial processes by effectively matching suitable participants, thus enhancing both speed and effectiveness.
 
Cedar AI's impact on the industry is significant, as it addresses one of the major bottlenecks in clinical research: participant recruitment and retention. By streamlining these processes, the company accelerates the pace of medical research while greatly enhancing the quality and reliability of clinical trials. This innovation offers the potential to bring new treatments and therapies to market more quickly, thereby improving patient outcomes and driving healthcare innovation.
 
Thanks to Mr. Kataria's leadership, Cedar AI has attracted substantial attention and investment from major venture capital firms. The company has successfully raised $4.9 million from prominent investors such as B-Star Investments, Elm Capital, LifeLeap Ventures, Frontline Capital, Summit Ventures, and Minh Tai. This financial backing serves as a testament to the confidence the investment community places in both Cedar AI's vision and Mr. Kataria's ability to execute it. Such support underscores Cedar AI's potential to make a lasting impact on the clinical trial landscape.
 
At Summit Ventures, we have invested $100,000 in Cedar AI, reflecting our steadfast belief in Mr. Kataria's vision and the transformative potential of his company. Renowned for our close collaboration with high-potential founders, we offer financial investment alongside mentorship and resources to foster startup growth. As a highly selective early-stage venture capital firm, we focus on mission-driven founders ready to tackle significant problems in large markets, providing extensive support in recruiting, fundraising, go-to-market strategies, and marketing to help transform ideas into profitable companies. This focus on technology, healthcare, and artificial intelligence aligns seamlessly with Mr. Kataria’s expertise.
 
Beyond his leadership at Cedar AI, Mr. Kataria possesses a rich background in technology and clinical research, exemplified by his role as a Software Engineer at the Stanford Department of Medicine. During his tenure there, he developed advanced software solutions designed to enhance participant recruitment for clinical trials. His role involved creating and implementing algorithms that streamlined participant matching with suitable trials, addressing a crucial bottleneck in clinical research. By optimizing these recruitment processes, Mr. Kataria accelerated the pace at which clinical trials could be conducted, ensuring a more diverse and representative participant pool. This improvement advanced the quality and inclusivity of trial outcomes while increasing the efficiency and accuracy of the recruitment process. His role required seamless collaboration with multidisciplinary teams, effectively combining technical skills with a deep understanding of clinical objectives and regulatory frameworks. Through this experience, Mr. Kataria demonstrated his exceptional ability to convert complex technical challenges into practical and impactful solutions, leaving a lasting influence on the efficiency and efficacy of clinical trials at Stanford.

In conclusion, Mr. Arjun Kataria is an extraordinary leader and innovator, whose contributions to the field of AI in clinical trials continue to pave the way for significant advancements in healthcare. His work has already left a profound impact on the industry, and the potential for further groundbreaking achievements under his leadership is immense. Mr. Kataria’s vision, coupled with his technical expertise and strategic acumen, make him an invaluable asset to any organization. I have full confidence in his continued success and am proud to offer my highest recommendation on his behalf.
Please don't hesitate to reach out if you need more details or further clarification.
Very truly yours


Victoria Cho
Partner
Summit Ventures
[email contact here]
